page.affiliates.title: Affiliate program — share a link, earn recurring | Persistent Cart
page.affiliates.desc: Creators, reviewers, and educators: share a one-click Shopify app that fixes a hidden cross-device cart leak, and earn recurring commission. Free to join.
page.affiliates.h1: Share a link to a fix Shopify stores actually need — and earn recurring.
page.affiliates.lede: If you reach Shopify merchants, Persistent Cart is an easy thing to recommend: it fixes a real, hidden cross-device cart leak in one click, with nothing for shoppers to do. Share your link and earn recurring commission on every store that sticks.
affiliates.terms: 30% recurring commission · 12 months per referral · 90-day cookie · free to join.
affiliates.how: Join free, get your link and a ready-to-share kit, and earn on every store that sticks.
affiliates.why.title: Why it converts for your audience
affiliates.why.1.title: A true, surprising story
affiliates.why.1.body: "The biggest stores keep a signed-in cart on every device — Shopify doesn't by default." It's verifiable, intuitive, and makes people check their own store.
affiliates.why.2.title: Low-risk to recommend
affiliates.why.2.body: One click, no theme code, no customer disruption, a free plan to start. There's very little for your audience to object to.
affiliates.why.3.title: Recurring, not one-and-done
affiliates.why.3.body: Earn {pct}% recurring commission for {months} months on each paying store — value that compounds as your referrals stick.
affiliates.tools.title: Shareable tools that do the selling
affiliates.tools.1: The lost-cart calculator — let readers estimate their own leak
affiliates.tools.2: The free store audit — a no-risk call to action
affiliates.tools.3: Clean logos, copy snippets, and the parity story
affiliates.form.title: Join the affiliate program
affiliates.form.success.heading: You're in the queue — thank you!
affiliates.form.success.body: We'll review your details and send your affiliate link, the shareable tools, and the finalized terms shortly.
affiliates.partnersCta: Run an agency or build client stores? The partner program may fit better.
